name: Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 large) Potato; cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 cup Green Beans; cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart casserole, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover and microwave at High for 25-35 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring once or twice.
